cards.style: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary-hover font-semibold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary-hover font-semibold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-gray-200 text-gray-900 hover:border-gray-900 font-semibold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 font-semibold rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-gray-400
components.navigation: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100
components.badges: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-accent text-gray-800

images.description: Woman receiving skin care, used for main hero section background
Coffee shop style business logo for generic business placeholders

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a modern marketplace platform inspired by Airbnb and Fresha. Prioritize clean spacing, rounded corners, large imagery, and high contrast typography. Ensure the app feels trustworthy, premium, and friendly.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='book-now-button').

layout_patterns.homepage: Use a hero section with a search bar overlaid on a subtle image or clean background. Follow with horizontally scrollable category pills, and a bento grid for featured/popular businesses.
layout_patterns.search_results: Implement a split layout: Left side scrollable list of business cards, Right side sticky map view (Airbnb style).
layout_patterns.business_profile: Top area: large masonry gallery of business images. Content area: Left column for description, services list, staff, and reviews. Right column: Sticky booking widget.
layout_patterns.booking_flow: Use a clean, step-by-step modal or dedicated page (Step 1: Select Service, Step 2: Select Staff/Time, Step 3: Confirm). Keep it under 4 steps, minimizing cognitive load.

components.cards: Business cards should feature a 16:9 image thumbnail, clear typography for title, a star rating, service tags, and price/distance.
components.modals: Use Shadcn Dialogs with customized rounded corners (rounded-2xl) and backdrop blur.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Inputs should be large and touch-friendly (py-3).

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: Use React, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, and lucide-react. Do not use generic html inputs for complex forms, use Shadcn equivalents.
